name: LaunchStack
description: AI-powered StartUp Accelerator Engine built with Next.js, LangChain, PostgreSQL + pgvector. Upload, organize, and chat with documents. Includes predictive missing-document detection, role-based workflows, and page-level insight extraction.
summaryZh: AI-powered StartUp Accelerator Engine built with Next.js, LangChain, PostgreSQL + pgvector. Upload, organize, and chat with documents. Includes predictive missing-document detection, role-based workflows, and page-level insight extraction. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
